questionHtml:
White phosphorus is an allotrope of phosphorus and exists as P4.

An equilibrium exists between PCl3 and PCl5.

PCl3 (g) + Cl2 (g) ⇌ PCl5 (g)

State, with a reason, the effect of an increase in temperature on the position of this equilibrium.
markschemeHtml: «shifts» left/towards reactants AND «forward reaction is» exothermic/ΔH is negative ✔

meta.title: State, with a reason, the effect of an increase in temperature on the position of this equilibrium.
breadcrumbLabels: Reactivity 2. How much, how fast and how far?
Reactivity 2.1—How much? The amount of chemical change
Reactivity 2.1.1—Chemical equations show the ratio of reactants and products in a reaction. Deduce chemical equations when reactants and products are specified.
